input.command:
/usr/bin/bash -lc "python - <<'PY'
import csv
rows=list(csv.DictReader(open('market.csv', newline='')))
active=[r for r in rows if r['is_resolved'].lower()=='false']
print('total', len(rows), 'active', len(active), 'resolved', len(rows)-len(active))
for r in active:
    print('\\n--- ACTIVE', r['qid'])
    for k in ['title','background','resolution_criteria','answer_type','resolution_date','options','my_prediction','my_prediction_date']:
        print(k+':', r.get(k,''))
print('\\nrecent resolved tail:')
for r in rows[-20:]:
    if r['is_resolved'].lower()=='true':
        print(r['qid'], r['resolution_date'], repr(r['ground_truth']), '-', r['title'][:140])
PY"
